title.purpose: Section headings, card titles, modal titles. The practical ceiling for most screens.

body.purpose: Card content, descriptions, form labels, AI chat responses. Line length capped at 65-75ch.

label.purpose: Status badges, metadata, timestamps, secondary annotations.

shadows.name: ring-only
shadows.purpose: Cards and surfaces at rest. Replaces a shadow — distinguishes surface without depth.

shadows.name: hover-lift
shadows.purpose: Cards and interactive surfaces on hover. The minimum legible lift.

shadows.name: elevated
shadows.purpose: Dropdowns, popovers, select menus — second layer above the page.

shadows.name: floating
shadows.purpose: Dialogs, command menus, tooltips — the highest layer.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for state transitions — ease-out-expo. Snaps in, doesn't linger.

motion.name: duration-fast
motion.purpose: Button states, hover fills, opacity changes.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single most important action on screen. Used once per view.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 6px; height: 36px; padding: 0 10px; background: var(--primary, oklch(0.205 0 0)); color: var(--primary-foreground, oklch(0.985 0 0)); border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 0.5rem; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; line-height: 1; white-space: nowrap; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), opacity 150ms ease; outline: none; user-select: none; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(0.205 0 0 / 0.8); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { border-color: var(--ring, oklch(0.708 0 0)); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.708 0 0 / 0.5); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(1px); } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; pointer-events: none; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary and icon actions inside cards, list items, and navigation. No visual presence at rest.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 6px; height: 36px; padding: 0 10px; background: transparent; color: var(--foreground, oklch(0.145 0 0)); border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 0.5rem; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; white-space: nowrap; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms ease, color 150ms ease; outline: none; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: var(--muted, oklch(0.97 0 0)); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { border-color: var(--ring, oklch(0.708 0 0)); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.708 0 0 / 0.5); } .ds-btn-ghost:disabled { opacity: 0.5; pointer-events: none; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary actions that need to be visible but not dominant. Paired with a primary button.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 6px; height: 36px; padding: 0 10px; background: var(--background, oklch(1 0 0)); color: var(--foreground, oklch(0.145 0 0)); border: 1px solid var(--border, oklch(0.922 0 0)); border-radius: 0.5rem; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; white-space: nowrap; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 0px 4px 8px -1px hsl(0 0% 0% / 0.05); transition: background 150ms ease; outline: none; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: var(--muted, oklch(0.97 0 0)); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { border-color: var(--ring, oklch(0.708 0 0)); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.708 0 0 / 0.5); } .ds-btn-outline:disabled { opacity: 0.5; pointer-events: none; }

components.name: Status Badge — Interviewing
components.description: Pipeline status indicator. One of nine possible states. Always appears alongside a job title.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 20px; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 9999px; border: 1px solid; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1; } .ds-badge-interviewing { background: oklch(0.5 0.2 300 / 0.1); color: oklch(0.4 0.2 300); border-color: oklch(0.75 0.12 300); } .ds-badge-offered { background: oklch(0.5 0.15 145 / 0.1); color: oklch(0.35 0.15 145); border-color: oklch(0.75 0.1 145); } .ds-badge-pending { background: oklch(0.5 0.15 240 / 0.1); color: oklch(0.4 0.15 240); border-color: oklch(0.75 0.1 240); } .ds-badge-applied { background: oklch(0.75 0.15 85 / 0.2); color: oklch(0.45 0.12 85); border-color: oklch(0.8 0.1 85); } .ds-badge-denied { background: oklch(0.577 0.245 27 / 0.1); color: oklch(0.45 0.2 27); border-color: oklch(0.75 0.15 27); } .ds-badge-neutral { background: var(--muted, oklch(0.97 0 0)); color: var(--muted-foreground, oklch(0.556 0 0)); border-color: var(--border, oklch(0.922 0 0)); }

components.name: Job Card
components.description: The primary working surface. One card per job in the pipeline. Links to full job detail.
components.html:
Senior Product Designer

Anthropic

Interviewing

Applied Jan 15
components.css: .ds-job-card { display: flex; flex-direction: column; overflow: hidden; border-radius: 0.875rem; background: var(--card, oklch(1 0 0)); box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px oklch(0.145 0 0 / 0.1); transition: box-shadow 200ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); cursor: pointer; } .ds-job-card:hover { box-shadow: 0px 4px 8px -1px hsl(0 0% 0% / 0.05), inset 0 0 0 1px oklch(0.145 0 0 / 0.1); } .ds-job-card-content { padding: 16px; } .ds-job-card-top { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; justify-content: space-between; gap: 12px; margin-bottom: 4px; } .ds-job-card-info { min-width: 0; flex: 1; } .ds-job-card-title { font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; color: var(--foreground, oklch(0.145 0 0)); margin: 0 0 2px 0; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-job-card-company { font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 400; font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; color: var(--muted-foreground, oklch(0.556 0 0)); margin: 0; } .ds-job-card-meta { font-size: 0.75rem; color: var(--muted-foreground, oklch(0.556 0 0)); margin: 8px 0 0 0; font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Stroke-style input on a transparent background. Used for URL paste, search, and form fields.
components.html: <input class="ds-input" type="text" placeholder="Paste a job URL..." />
components.css: .ds-input { display: block; width: 100%; min-width: 0; height: 36px; padding: 4px 10px; background: transparent; color: var(--foreground, oklch(0.145 0 0)); border: 1px solid var(--input, oklch(0.922 0 0)); border-radius: 0.5rem; font-size: 0.875rem; font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; line-height: 1.5; box-shadow: 0px 4px 8px -1px hsl(0 0% 0% / 0.05); transition: border-color 150ms ease, box-shadow 150ms ease; outline: none; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: var(--muted-foreground, oklch(0.556 0 0)); } .ds-input:focus-visible { border-color: var(--ring, oklch(0.708 0 0)); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.708 0 0 / 0.5); } .ds-input:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; pointer-events: none; } .ds-input[aria-invalid='true'] { border-color: var(--destructive, oklch(0.577 0.245 27.325)); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.577 0.245 27.325 / 0.2); }

components.name: Nav Tabs
components.description: Top-level navigation between Jobs, Companies, and Reports. Text-based with active underline.
components.css: .ds-tabs { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; } .ds-tab { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; height: 36px; padding: 0 12px; background: transparent; color: var(--muted-foreground, oklch(0.556 0 0)); border: none; border-radius: 0.5rem; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: color 150ms ease, background 150ms ease; outline: none; position: relative; } .ds-tab:hover { color: var(--foreground, oklch(0.145 0 0)); background: var(--muted, oklch(0.97 0 0)); } .ds-tab-active { color: var(--foreground, oklch(0.145 0 0)); background: var(--muted, oklch(0.97 0 0)); } .ds-tab:focus-visible { box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.708 0 0 / 0.5); }

narrative.overview:
Folio is built for the long middle of a job search: weeks of careful triage, the daily discipline of moving applications forward, the evening reviews that make the next morning manageable. Its design reflects that reality — composed, purposeful, nothing decorative. Like a well-calibrated instrument panel, every reading earns its position. The interface does not celebrate the search; it supports it.

The system is restrained by design: an achromatic neutral foundation with a single chromatic layer reserved for semantic pipeline status. Color in Folio is never decorative — always informational. The type scale is modest and built for repeated daily use. Surfaces are flat at rest, lifting only under interaction.

Folio explicitly rejects the corporate-blue anxiety of LinkedIn, Indeed, and Facebook: the notification-badge pressure, the metric-heavy feeds, the aggressive CTAs. Nothing here is trying to sell anything.
keyCharacteristics: Achromatic foundation with semantic color only at the pipeline status layer
Flat surfaces at rest; structural shadows on hover and elevation
Tight type scale with no display hierarchy
Rounded-md for interactive elements, rounded-xl for containers
System font stack: legible, zero loading overhead

rules.name: The Instrument Reading Rule
rules.body: Color in Folio is exclusively informational. If a color is not communicating pipeline state, a destructive condition, or an interaction state, it should not be there.

rules.name: The No-Display Rule
rules.body: There is no display or hero type size in Folio. The largest visible text is a job title or section heading. Nothing here is meant to impress at a glance; everything is meant to be read at work.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: A shadow at rest means nothing — it reads as invisible noise. If a surface needs to be distinguished at rest, use a ring. If it needs to respond to interaction, use a shadow. Never use both as decoration.

dos: Do use semantic status badge colors for pipeline state communication — they are the only intentional color in the system.
Do use ring-1 ring-foreground/10 on card surfaces at rest instead of shadows.
Do keep button labels direct and actionable: one verb or a short noun phrase.
Do cap body text columns at 65-75ch, particularly in job detail and AI chat views.
Do use ghost buttons for secondary actions inside cards and list items.
Do use OKLCH for any new color tokens. Never add hex or HSL to the :root block.
Do flatten shadows on new surfaces at rest. If distinction is needed at rest, use a ring.
donts: Don't reproduce the notification-badge anxiety, metric-heavy feeds, or aggressive CTAs of LinkedIn, Indeed, or Facebook.
Don't add decorative color: no gradient accents, no colored headings, no tinted card backgrounds unless they carry status meaning.
Don't use a display or hero type size.
Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe on list items or cards.
Don't use glassmorphism or backdrop-filter effects.
Don't use shadows on page-level surfaces at rest.
